title: SpaceX 已向 SEC 递交保密 IPO 申请，承销商名单曝光
summary: 知情人士透露，SpaceX 于 4 月 1 日正式提交保密 IPO 申请，高盛与摩根士丹利担任联席主承销商，目标估值区间 $3500 亿–$4000 亿美元，S-1 最快 5 月初公开。

title: SpaceX gears up for Starship Flight 13
summary:
SpaceX plans to conduct its next Starship launch as soon as July 16 to test fixes to issues from the previous flight and deploy functioning Starlink satellites.

title: What Is Robinhood Chain? The Ethereum Layer-2 Network for Tokenized Stocks
summary: Robinhood Chain is an Ethereum layer-2 network built with Arbitrum technology for tokenized assets, crypto apps, and on-chain financial products.

title: OpenAI bets on families as ChatGPT goes deeper into households
summary: ChatGPT is hiring a dedicated product manager to build experiences for families, caregivers, and older adults, according to a job posting.

title: Ethereum climbs 3% on tokenization boom: Can bulls push ETH price past $1,800?
summary: Despite strong tokenization gains and institutional accumulation, weak onchain and derivatives data leaves ETH vulnerable to a $1,700 retest.

title: Apple Sues OpenAI, Claims Former Employees Stole Trade Secrets
summary: Apple alleges former employees took confidential designs, supplier information, and engineering files before joining OpenAI.

title: Apple sues OpenAI over alleged trade secret theft
summary: Apple alleges the misconduct was directed by OpenAI's senior leadership, including a longtime former employee.

title: SK Hynix raises $26.5B in the biggest foreign IPO in US history, is urged to build new US fabs
summary: The AI chip boom just produced its biggest Wall Street moment yet. Now SK Hynix and Samsung are being asked to build U.S. factories.

title: China is catching up to Elon Musk’s reusable rockets
summary: China's state-owned space company recovered its first orbital rocket booster after launch.

summary:

title: Avalanche Treasury Firm AVAX One Reclaims Nasdaq Compliance After Reverse Stock Split
summary: AVAX One, which stockpiles the native token of the Avalanche crypto network, is back in Nasdaq's good graces after a reverse stock split.

title: Anthropic AI Oversight Board Adds Ben Bernanke, Who Oversaw 2008 Financial Crisis at Fed
summary: Former Fed Chair Ben Bernanke will have the power to appoint Anthropic board members as part of company's Long-Term Benefit Trust.
